title: Interstellar Relay Beam Fan-Out Phase Mask
strategies: trivial: cheapest binary (0/pi) phase mask (evaluator baseline) -> ~0.1
greedy: one-shot analog grating-superposition mask (full continuous phase) -> recovers efficiency+uniformity over the binary etch, no iteration
strong: weighted / adaptive-additive Gerchberg-Saxton -> reweights per-spot targets to equalize brightness, high efficiency AND uniformity
invalid: emits a flat 1-D phase list instead of the required N-by-N grid -> rejected by the shape gate -> 0
